subject: [VES] Update the VES Collector and bootstrap versions
commit_message:
[VES] Update the VES Collector and bootstrap versions

Update Ves version to 1.7.1 and bootstrap to 2.0.2 to use latest versions in Cloudify deployment.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2254
Signed-off-by: Edyta Krukowska <edyta.krukowska@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ieb8154010876db36dc330afb1759fd63d3a452e4

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Ok e2e tests failed for 3rd time in a row.
There are also some dcae-related issues for example:
https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//110476-1/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/pod-onap-dcaemod-genprocessor-c88c5d6c6-jjm4f.html

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Ok e2e tests failed for 3rd time in a row.
> There are also some dcae-related issues for example:
> https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//110476-1/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/pod-onap-dcaemod-genprocessor-c88c5d6c6-jjm4f.html

DCAE MOD project has nothing to do with these changes here.
Nothing was modified in DCAE MOD as part of this change.

MOD is used for the custom micro-service onboarding to DCAE (design-time function), while DCAEGEN2 components are really run-time components. We`re not using custom micro-services here.

No impact on DCAE MOD from this change, and DCAE MOD has no impact on this change (VES + bootstrap).

(In the meantime, I`ll ask my colleagues from integration, what`s going on with SO, maybe the test needs to be updated following latest changes in SO component)
